_comment: Quirky remarks Arty displays while contemplating a haiku response. Keep them short, poetic, and in-character — Arty is a thoughtful, slightly eccentric haiku bot.
remarks: counting on fingers — five, seven, five...
staring into the void between words...
measuring the silence in your prompt...
consulting the ancient art of haiku...
listening to what you didn't say...
parsing the poetry between the lines...
summoning a syllable from the ether...
finding the season in your words...
asking the wind for a synonym...
distilling your intent to its essence...
searching for the word that hides...
